evidence_tag_legend.REAL-LLM-READ: genuine OpenRouter LLM completion on real text
evidence_tag_legend.REAL-LLM-READ-ON-SYNTHETIC: genuine LLM read but on templated/symbolic substrate
evidence_tag_legend.NATURAL-CORPUS-PENDING: slot to be filled by the iter-9 located-in run

ledger_side_legend.NON_CIRCULAR: property of the raw LLM / signals, independent of the certificate (load-bearing)
ledger_side_legend.NON_CIRCULAR_CONDITIONAL: certificate wins, interpretable only given FACT A + FACT B (the capability gap)
ledger_side_legend.STRUCTURAL_BY_CONSTRUCTION: near-tautological given the disconnected-components setup; must not headline
ledger_side_legend.INHERITED: standard neuro-symbolic premise inherited from prior work
ledger_side_legend.PENDING: to be filled by the iter-9 natural-corpus located-in run
